##DFHRPL
CICS.SDFHLOAD ;;PROC=CICSPROC
MY.SITE.LOADLIB ;;PROC=CICSPROC
##SIT
;;PROC=CICSPROC
APPLID=CICSA,GRPLIST=DFHLIST
SEC=YES
##CSD
CICS.PROD.DFHCSD ;;PROC=CICSPROC
##CSDUP_REPORT
;;CSD_DSN=CICS.PROD.DFHCSD
1DFHCSDUP  CSD LIST UTILITY  PAGE 1
GROUP: GRP1
PROGRAM PROG1
TRANSACTION TRAN1
GROUP: GRP2
FILE FILE001
